Index.title: Shape Your Career with AI
Index.description: Create ATS-friendly CVs in seconds, write professional letters, and find your dream job 85% faster.
Index.featuresDesc: We have shortened the path to your career goals with the most advanced AI models.
Index.howItWorksDesc: Transform your career in 3 simple steps.
Index.atsDesc: Our AI ensures your CV is 100% compatible with systems used by Fortune 500 companies.
Index.previewDesc: Explore a professional-grade CV generated by our AI in seconds.
Index.comparisonDesc: Don't settle for generic tools. Everything you need on a single platform.
Index.testimonialsDesc: From software engineers to designers, hear from those who landed their dream jobs.
Index.pricingDesc: Simple, transparent, and affordable career support plans for every budget.
Index.ctaFinalDesc: Make a difference in your applications with the CV you will create in minutes.
Index.faq1a: Yes. Every template in CareerAI is tested against the parser criteria of Workday, SAP, Taleo, and Lever. We ensure zero formatting errors.
Index.faq2q: What AI model do you use?
Index.faq2a: We use a fine-tuned GPT-4o engine specifically trained on high-converting resumes and professional recruitment standards.
Index.faq3a: Absolutely. No contracts, no friction. You can manage and cancel your subscription via the dashboard with one click.

ProcessSteps.1_desc: Import your current CV or start with a blank canvas. Our AI scans for structure.
ProcessSteps.2_desc: Our GPT-4o engine transforms your experience into high-impact, professional content.
ProcessSteps.3_desc: Export your ATS-ready PDF and land your dream job faster than ever before.

ATS.time_desc: From draft to PDF in 2 mins
ATS.aiDesc: Based on current Job Market Trends
ATS.s2: Formatting is 100% readable by top ATS systems.
ATS.s3: Add 'Cloud Architecture' to 'Skills' for a 95% match.

Testimonials.t1_quote: CareerAI helped me bypass the initial screening at Stripe. The ATS optimization is world-class. Worth every penny.
Testimonials.t2_quote: I was struggling to explain my design impact. The AI analyzed my portfolio and wrote experience bullets that actually land interviews.
Testimonials.t3_quote: As a student with little experience, CareerAI found the right keywords to highlight my university projects. Got 3 offers in 2 weeks.

Footer.desc: The next-generation career accelerator. We empower professionals through specialized AI to land dream roles in top companies.

Preview.summary: Strategic Solutions Architect with 8+ years of experience in designing and implementing scalable cloud-native architectures. Proven track record of reducing infrastructure costs by 35% while improving deployment frequency for Fortune 500 fintech companies.
Preview.d1: Spearheaded the migration of monolithic architectures to serverless environments using Terraform and AWS Lambda. Managed a team of 15 engineers delivering 99.99% uptime.
Preview.d2: Architected real-time video processing pipelines for 2M concurrent users. Optimized database queries resulting in a 40% reduction in latency.
